---
title: "EMPA_SLR_Code"
author: "Brooke Fulkerson"
date: "2025-06-13"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

#Load Packages

```{r load packages}

library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
library(tidyr)
library(ggrepel)

```

#Load Data

```{r load data}

wetland_extents <- read.csv("Data/BufferZones_ForR.csv")

```

#Clean Data

```{r order wetland data}

wetland_extents$Cover_class <- factor(wetland_extents$Cover_class, levels = c('Other', 'Upland', 'High', 'Mid', 
                                                                              'Low', 'Water', ordered = TRUE))

wetland_extents$Site_ID <- factor(wetland_extents$Site_ID, levels = c('NC-TEN', 'NC-BIGR', 'NC-NAV', 'NC-DRA', 'NC-BOL',
                                                        'CC-PAJ', 'CC-MCS', 'CC-CAR', 'CC-ADLC', 'CC-MOR',
                                                        'SC-GOL', 'SC-VEN', 'SC-MAL', 'SC-BOL', 'SC-NEW', 'SC-BAT'),
                           ordered = TRUE)

wetland_extents$Region <- factor(wetland_extents$Region, levels = c('North', 'Central', 'South',
                                                                    ordered = TRUE))

wetland_extents$Extent <- factor(wetland_extents$Extent, levels = c('Current Wetland Footprint', 'Wetland Migration/Avoid Developed (1.2 ft)', 'Wetland Migration/All Areas (1.2 ft)',
                                                                    ordered = TRUE))

```

#Plot Colors

```{r plot colors}

region_colors <- c("#56B4E9", "#009E73", "#F0E442")

MPA_colors <- c("#0072B2", "#D55E00")

mouth_colors <- c("#000000", "#CC79A7")

veg_colors <- c("#009900", "#3399FF", "#CC0033", "black")

habitat_colors <- c("#999999", "#0072B2", "#CC79A7")

elevation_colors <- c("#E69F00", "#F0E442", "#009E73", "#56B4E9")

veg_open_colors <- c("#999999", "#009E73")

```

#Function Analysis

##Figures

###CRAM

```{r CRAM CDF - Index}

#create empirical CDF function with state data
cdf_fn_i <- ecdf(CRAM$indexscore)

#calculate CDF y-values for EMPA sites
CRAM$index_y <- cdf_fn_i(CRAM$EMPA_index)

#plot CDF for Index scores
CRAM_index_CDF <- CRAM %>%
  ggplot(aes(indexscore)) +
  stat_ecdf(geom = "step",
            color = "black",
            linewidth = 1) +
  theme_bw() +
  xlab("CRAM Index Score") +
  ylab("% of Population") +
  ggtitle("Statewide CRAM Scores 2014 - 2024") +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0,1,0.1), 
                     labels = seq(0,100,10)) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face="bold",
                                  size=18,
                                  hjust=0.5)) +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(face="bold",
                                    size=16),
        axis.text.x= element_text(size=16)) +
  theme(axis.title.y = element_text(angle=90, 
                                    face="bold", 
                                    size=16, 
                                    vjust=1.5),
        axis.text.y  = element_text(size=16)) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 14)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = c(.33, .66), 
             linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_point(aes(x = EMPA_index, 
                 y = index_y,
                 fill = EMPA_MPA),
             size = 3,
             shape = 21) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = MPA_colors, na.translate = F) +
  geom_text_repel(aes(x = EMPA_index,
                      y = index_y,
                      label = EMPA_siteid),
                  size = 5,
                  nudge_y = 0.2,
                  hjust = 1,
                  direction = "y",
                  force = 2)

CRAM_index_CDF

```

```{r CRAM CDF - biotic}

#create empirical CDF function with state data
cdf_fn_b <- ecdf(CRAM$biotic_structure)

#calculate CDF y-values for EMPA sites
CRAM$biotic_y <- cdf_fn_b(CRAM$EMPA_bio)

#plot CDF for Index scores
CRAM_Bio_CFD <- CRAM %>%
  ggplot(aes(biotic_structure)) +
  stat_ecdf(geom = "step",
            color = "black",
            linewidth = 1) +
  theme_bw() +
  xlab("Biotic Attribute Score") +
  ylab("% of Population") +
  ggtitle("Statewide Biotic Attribute Scores 2014 - 2024") +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0,1,0.1), 
                     labels = seq(0,100,10)) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face="bold",
                                  size=18,
                                  hjust=0.5)) +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(face="bold",
                                    size=16),
        axis.text.x= element_text(size=16)) +
  theme(axis.title.y = element_text(angle=90, 
                                    face="bold", 
                                    size=16, 
                                    vjust=1.5),
        axis.text.y  = element_text(size=16)) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 14)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = c(.33, .66),
             linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_point(aes(x = EMPA_bio, 
                 y = biotic_y,
                 fill = EMPA_MPA),
             size = 3,
             shape = 21) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = MPA_colors, na.translate = F) +
  geom_text_repel(aes(x = EMPA_bio,
                      y = biotic_y,
                      label = EMPA_siteid),
                  size = 5,
                  nudge_y = 0.2,
                  hjust = 1,
                  direction = "y",
                  force = 2)

CRAM_Bio_CFD

```

```{r CRAM CDF - Physical}

#create empirical CDF function with state data
cdf_fn_p <- ecdf(CRAM$physical_structure)

#calculate CDF y-values for EMPA sites
CRAM$phys_y <- cdf_fn_p(CRAM$EMPA_phys)

#plot CDF for Index scores
CRAM_Phys_CFD <- CRAM %>%
  ggplot(aes(physical_structure)) +
  stat_ecdf(geom = "step",
            color = "black",
            linewidth = 1) +
  theme_bw() +
  xlab("Physical Attribute Score") +
  ylab("% of Population") +
  ggtitle("Statewide Physical Attribute Scores 2014 - 2024") +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0,1,0.1), 
                     labels = seq(0,100,10)) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face="bold",
                                  size=18,
                                  hjust=0.5)) +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(face="bold",
                                    size=16),
        axis.text.x= element_text(size=16)) +
  theme(axis.title.y = element_text(angle=90, 
                                    face="bold", 
                                    size=16, 
                                    vjust=1.5),
        axis.text.y  = element_text(size=16)) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 14)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = c(.33, .66),
             linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_point(aes(x = EMPA_phys, 
                 y = phys_y,
                 fill = EMPA_MPA),
             size = 3,
             shape = 21) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = MPA_colors, na.translate = F) +
  geom_text_repel(aes(x = EMPA_phys,
                      y = phys_y,
                      label = EMPA_siteid),
                  size = 5,
                  nudge_y = 0.2,
                  hjust = 1,
                  direction = "y",
                  force = 2)

CRAM_Phys_CFD

```

###Veg Cover

```{r percent veg cover in upper marsh}

veg_open_cover <- veg_metadata_clean %>%
  filter(habitat != "Low marsh") %>%
  filter(habitat != "Upland") %>%
  filter(habitat != "Not recorded") %>%
  filter(habitat != "Unvegetated salt panne") %>%
  filter(siteid != "NA") %>%
  filter(Year == "Year 2") %>%
  ggplot(aes(y = cover_value,
             x = siteid,
             fill = cover_type)) +
  theme_bw() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = veg_open_colors,
                    labels = str_wrap(c("Non-Vegetated Cover", "Vegetated Cover"),
                                     width = 14)) +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = rev) +
  coord_flip() +
  geom_bar(position = "fill", stat = "identity") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = c(0.33, 0.66),
             linetype = "dashed") +
  ylab("Percent Cover") +
  xlab("Site ID") +
  ggtitle("Percent Vegetated Cover in Upper Marsh Habitats") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(scale = 100)) +
  theme(strip.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", 
                                    size = 16)) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face="bold",
					                        size=18,
                                  hjust=0.5)) +
  theme(axis.title.y = element_text(angle=90, 
                                    face="bold", 
                                    size=16, 
                                    vjust=1.5),
        axis.text.y  = element_text(size=16)) +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(face="bold",
                                    size=16),
        axis.text.x= element_text(size=16)) +
  theme(legend.title = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 14))

veg_open_cover

```

###Upland Migration

####Buffer (TBD)

####Elevation

#####North

```{r north sites}

wet_hab_north <- wetland_extents %>%
  filter(Region == "North") %>%
  filter(Cover_class != "Other") %>%
  filter(Cover_class != "Upland") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Extent,
             y = Percent_cover,
             fill = Cover_class)) +
  theme_bw() +
  geom_bar(position = "fill", stat = "identity", width = 0.5) +
  facet_wrap(.~ Site_ID, ncol = 2) +
  xlab("Sea Level Rise") +
  ylab("Relative Cover") +
  ggtitle("Habitat Distribution Comparison") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=elevation_colors) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = function(x) str_wrap(x, width = 16)) +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold", 
                                    size = 16),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8),
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", 
                                  size = 18, 
                                  hjust = 0.5),
        axis.title.y = element_text(angle = 90, 
                                    face = "bold", 
                                    size = 16, 
                                    vjust = 1.5),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
        strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", 
                                  size = 10))

wet_hab_north

```

#####Central

```{r central sites}

wet_hab_central <- wetland_extents %>%
  filter(Region == "Central") %>%
  filter(Cover_class != "Other") %>%
  filter(Cover_class != "Upland") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Extent,
             y = Percent_cover,
             fill = Cover_class)) +
  theme_bw() +
  geom_bar(position = "fill", stat = "identity", width = 0.5) +
  facet_wrap(.~ Site_ID, ncol = 2) +
  xlab("Sea Level Rise") +
  ylab("Relative Cover") +
  ggtitle("Habitat Distribution Comparison") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=elevation_colors) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = function(x) str_wrap(x, width = 16)) +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold", 
                                    size = 16),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8),
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", 
                                  size = 18, 
                                  hjust = 0.5),
        axis.title.y = element_text(angle = 90, 
                                    face = "bold", 
                                    size = 16, 
                                    vjust = 1.5),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
        strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", 
                                  size = 10))

wet_hab_central

```

#####South

```{r south sites}

wet_hab_south <- wetland_extents %>%
  filter(Region == "South") %>%
  filter(Cover_class != "Other") %>%
  filter(Cover_class != "Upland") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Extent,
             y = Percent_cover,
             fill = Cover_class)) +
  theme_bw() +
  geom_bar(position = "fill", stat = "identity", width = 0.5) +
  facet_wrap(.~ Site_ID, ncol = 2) +
  xlab("Sea Level Rise") +
  ylab("Relative Cover") +
  ggtitle("Habitat Distribution Comparison") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=elevation_colors) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = function(x) str_wrap(x, width = 16)) +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold", 
                                    size = 16),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8),
        plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", 
                                  size = 18, 
                                  hjust = 0.5),
        axis.title.y = element_text(angle = 90, 
                                    face = "bold", 
                                    size = 16, 
                                    vjust = 1.5),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 14),
        strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", 
                                  size = 10))

wet_hab_south

```

###Sediment Accretion (TBD)
